title: CSS Box Model and Layout
description: Master the CSS box model, understand margin, padding, border, and content areas. Learn about display properties, positioning, and layout techniques to create structured web pages.
learningObjectives: Understand the CSS box model components
Control margin, padding, and border spacing
Create flexible layouts with modern techniques

subtopics.title: The CSS Box Model
Margin and Padding
Display Property
CSS Positioning
Overflow and Visibility

recommendedTools.name: Box Model Debugger
recommendedTools.reason: Browser tool to visualize box model

recommendedTools.name: CSS Grid Garden
recommendedTools.reason: Interactive game to learn CSS Grid

glossary.definition: The CSS concept that wraps every HTML element, consisting of margin, border, padding, and content.
The space outside an element's border, creating distance from other elements.
The space between an element's content and its border.
Property that determines whether width includes padding and border.
Controls how an element is displayed (block, inline, flex, grid, etc.).
Method of placing elements in specific locations on the page.
Property that controls the stacking order of positioned elements.
Controls how content that exceeds an element's box is handled.
